License: confirm commercial rights for t_shirt asset before live sales.

Staged fallback for productId 1 if tee-t_shirt-white-v1 looks wrong in 360° QA — heavier (6.7MB, ~204k verts) than tee-t_shirt-white-v1. Not wired into MODEL_PATHS unless swapped in. License: confirm commercial rights before live sales.
